ideas.title: Islamic Repeating Art
ideas.summary: Ten-fold tessellations blending pentagrams with pentagon-based hexagon motifs and decimal connections.

ideas.title: Marbled Patterns
ideas.summary: Flowing SVG marbling with swirled ribbons and ink-like bands.

ideas.title: Space Filling Curves
ideas.summary: Randomly spawned circles and squares filled with selectable space-filling trajectories.

ideas.title: Step Spline Lab
ideas.summary: Click-built splines rendered as continuous strokes, dots, or formula-sized step lines.
